payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No query was run and no memory was read or changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL/debug command, not a user memory assertion. SQL execution is disabled by configuration (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false).

details: Detected admin SQL request: SELECT * FROM memory_cards.
BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so SQL execution was blocked.
No current memory facts were returned.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an authorized debug environment before issuing admin SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL Brain admin/debug interfaces if available.
